source: National Park Service — Wrangell-St. Elias National Park & Preserve
artist: NPS Photo (Southeast Alaska Network Inventory & Monitoring Program)
title: Hubbard Glacier viewed from Gilbert Point
description: Elevated view of the Hubbard Glacier terminus from near Gilbert Point, the 'choke point' where the glacier's 1986 and 2002 advances dammed Russell Fjord. Shows the blue-ice face, textured glacier surface, and surrounding St. Elias peaks with alder shrubs in the foreground.
alt: Hubbard Glacier from Gilbert Point with textured blue ice face and St. Elias peaks behind
